questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: After a purchase, the shopkeeper returns ₹ 100 extra to you. You will

choices.a: treat your friends to a lunch
choices.b: offer ₹ 20 at a temple and pray for more such instance
choices.c: hope he will give another ₹ 100 extra
choices.d: return the extra money to the shopkeeper

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Your family is going to your aunt's house, whom you do not particularly like. What would you do?

choices.a: Stay at home and enjoy yourself
choices.b: Go to your aunt's house but stay outside
choices.c: Go to your aunt's place and maintain a comfort level
choices.d: Try and convince your brother and sister to stay back with you as you cannot stay back at home

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Your colleague is not performing his duties upto the mark. You will

choices.a: just do your part of the duties and enjoy your work
choices.b: take advantage of it to promote yourself
choices.d: try and handle his customers to maintain the company's status

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: When someone demands something undesirable, you

choices.a: always try to avoid the man
choices.b: neglect the person and leave the place
choices.c: always try to explain your inability to meet the demand
choices.d: try to teach him a lesson, so that he does not repeat the same behaviour

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Your classmate who is usually very energetic and happy all the time looks very down and upset. You

choices.b: tell one of your friends to go and talk to her
choices.c: go up to her and ask the reason
choices.d: wait for her to come up and tell you the reason

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: You are in a bus. The bus reaches your stop but still you have not purchased the ticket because of heavy rush. What will you do?

choices.a: Jump out quickly to avoid embarrassment
choices.b: Call the conductor give him the money and get the ticket
choices.c: Hand the money to someone sitting nearby to give it to the conductor
choices.d: Give the money to the driver

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: You are getting late for your college and no bus is available. In such a situation

choices.b: you drop the idea of going to college that day and return home
choices.c: you think about other possible conveyance
choices.d: you wait patiently for the bus though you are late for the class

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Suppose one of your friends drops your camera while handling it carelessly. You would

choices.a: ask him to buy a new camera and replace it
choices.b: never keep any connection with him
choices.d: tell him to be careful while handling such delicate things

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: You are alone in the house and your sister-in-law is suddenly experiencing labour pains. You

choices.a: would definitely get upset and do not know what is the right step
choices.b: go out of the house to call your family doctor
choices.c: walk her to the nearest hospital

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: You are a sincere and dedicated manager in a reputed five star hotel. You have been appointed as the Chief Manager of the Guwahati branch which needs to be developed. Your salary has been hiked.

choices.a: You give it a shot for two months and see how it goes
choices.b: You accept the challenge and go ahead with the project
choices.c: You accept another offer and leave the job
choices.d: You crib for limited resources and try to convince the superior to send somebody else instead of you

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: You are competing with your batchmate for a prestigious award to be decided based on an oral presentation. Ten minutes are allowed for each presentation. You have been asked by the committee to finish on time. Your friend, however is allowed more than the stipulated time period. You would

choices.a: lodge a complaint to the chairperson against the discrimination
choices.b: not listen to any justification from the committee
choices.c: ask for withdrawal of your name

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: While travelling in a train, you observe some college students pulling the alarm chain simply to get down at their desired point. You would

choices.a: with the help of some passengers, check them from doing so
choices.b: let them pull the chain but check them from detraining
choices.c: inform the guard of the train as soon as it stops

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: You have been transferred to a new department. You find that most of the staff members criticise another. You should

choices.a: try to know the weakness of staff members
choices.b: hold a meeting and try to create an organisation culture
